manual_local: Printf an OSC 52 copy sequence inside a pane and confirm the host clipboard updates.
manual_remote: Run the same check through gmux --remote and confirm the local clipboard updates.
notes: Required for editor and shell clipboard integration.

manual_local: Cat OSC 8 hyperlink text inside a pane and confirm supported terminals expose a clickable link.
manual_remote: Repeat through gmux --remote and confirm the local client preserves the link.
notes: Requires a terminal with OSC 8 hyperlink support.

manual_local: Run a CSI-u aware app or fixture and confirm modified keys reach the child process.
manual_remote: Repeat through gmux --remote with local keybindings and server keybindings.
notes: Important for modern editors and shells.

manual_local: Render a small Kitty graphics sample with experimental.kitty_graphics enabled.
manual_remote: Repeat through gmux --remote and confirm graphics render or degrade without corrupting text.
notes: Requires Kitty graphics support in the host terminal.

manual_local: Paste multi-line text into a shell or editor and confirm it arrives atomically.
notes: Protects pasted commands and editor input.

manual_local: Run a mouse-reporting TUI, click, drag, scroll, and resize pane borders.
notes: Covers SGR mouse routing and gmux mouse controls.

manual_local: Run a focus-aware program and switch terminal focus in and out.
notes: Covers focus mode tracking and forwarding.

manual_local: Run shell prompts or apps that change cursor shape and confirm the attached client follows.
notes: Host terminal must expose cursor shape changes.

manual_local: Run rapid output and confirm frames do not visibly tear.
manual_remote: Repeat through gmux --remote over a slower connection.
notes: Protects the ANSI blitter and semantic frame path.

manual_local: Render emoji, flags, combining accents, and wide CJK text in a pane.
notes: Protects diff rendering and cell invalidation.
